uplink.description: Davis-style weather report (0x0B 0x20 0x00): pressure 1013 hPa, 21.72 C, 58% RH, wind 4.47 m/s @ 215 deg, rain rate 1.0 mm/h, day rain 2.4 mm, UV/solar/ET extras
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js parseWeather and normalizing to vocabulary keys/units (inHg*1000 -> hPa, degF*10 -> degC, mph -> m/s, tip-count -> mm). Upstream emits these same values as toFixed() strings under variable/value/unit table keys (pressure 1013.00, outsideTemperature 21.72, windSpeed 4.47, windDirection 215.00, outsideHumidity 58.00, rainRate 1.00, dayRain 2.40, uv 4, solarRadiation 640.00, dayET 1.27).

uplink.description: Temperature/humidity/pressure + PM report (0x0B 0x30 0x00): 22.5 C, 58% RH, 1013.25 hPa, PM1/2.5/10 = 3/7/12, battery 85%
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js parseTERPM and normalizing (native MCF signed temp/100, humidity/2, 3-byte pressure/100). Upstream values: temperature 22.50, humidity 58.00, pressure 1013.25, pm1 3, pm25 7, pm10 12, battery 85. Battery percentage emitted as batteryPercent (vocabulary battery is volts). Timestamp emitted as RFC3339 UTC instead of upstream's locale-dependent toLocaleString date.

Synthetic in-bounds input; expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js parsePM. Upstream values: pm1 3, pm25 7, pm10 12. Timestamp emitted as RFC3339 UTC instead of upstream's locale-dependent toLocaleString date. This dust-only frame carries no air temperature/pressure, so it does not on its own satisfy the weather-station category requirements.

uplink.description: Unsupported top-level frame id (0x04 TER frame is not a weather report)
uplink._note: Synthetic error vector: only the report-data uplink (0x0B) carries the LWWS03 weather suite; other MCF88 frame ids are rejected by this device codec.
